productName: SPR - 1g Hash Rosin Infused Blunt - Orangeade x Blue Slushie
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Orangeade x Blue Slushie, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of orange, citrus, and woody, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
